mapper.select: select s.student_name,c.course_name,sc.score from student s join demo.sc on s.student_id = sc.student_id join demo.course c on c.course_id = sc.course_id
select s.student_name,c.course_name,sc.score from student s join demo.sc on s.student_id = sc.student_id join demo.course c on c.course_id = sc.course_id where s.student_name = #{name};

select s.student_name,c.course_name,sc.score from student s join demo.sc on s.student_id = sc.student_id join demo.course c on c.course_id = sc.course_id where c.course_name='高等数学' and sc.score>#{score};
